headline: Alaska Airlines door plug blows out mid-flight
outcome: Boeing 737 MAX 9 fleet grounded, stock plummeted, massive safety audit initiated
context_notes: Fuselage panel blew off flight 1282. Revealed quality control issues at Spirit AeroSystems and Boeing. CEO Dave Calhoun eventually announced resignation.

headline: Rabbit r1 AI device announced at CES
outcome: Generated massive hype, sold out batches, but faced poor reviews upon release
context_notes: CES 2024 dominated by AI hardware. Humane AI Pin also launching. Rabbit promised 'Large Action Model' to control apps. Symbol of the 'AI gadget' bubble.

headline: Bitcoin ETFs approved by SEC
outcome: 11 spot Bitcoin ETFs approved, massive institutional inflows followed
context_notes: Grayscale won court case against SEC in Aug 2023. BlackRock filed ETF application June 2023. SEC had rejected previous applications for years. Crypto market recovering from 2022 crash.

headline: Trump wins Iowa caucuses decisively
outcome: 51% of vote, DeSantis distant second at 21%, Haley third
context_notes: Trump leading polls since announcing Nov 2022. DeSantis hype from 2022 midterms fading. Four indictments against Trump in 2023. GOP primary debates without Trump.

headline: Japan's SLIM lander achieves precision moon landing
outcome: Japan becomes 5th country to land on moon, landed upside down but transmitted data
context_notes: JAXA mission focused on 'pinpoint' landing technology. Landed within 55m of target. Solar panels initially faced wrong way but revived later.

headline: Neuralink implants first brain chip in human patient
outcome: Noland Arbaugh successfully controls computer cursor with thoughts, company valued at $5B
context_notes: Musk announced Neuralink in 2017. FDA approved human trials May 2023. Competitor Synchron already had human implants. Arbaugh is quadriplegic from diving accident.

headline: Apple Vision Pro launches in US
outcome: Technical marvel with limited app ecosystem, high price ($3500) limited adoption
context_notes: Apple's first new major product category since Apple Watch. Focus on 'Spatial Computing'. VR/AR market struggling (Meta Quest). High manufacturing complexity.

headline: Taylor Swift attends Super Bowl as Travis Kelce girlfriend
outcome: Chiefs won Super Bowl, Swift-Kelce relationship dominated media coverage
context_notes: Swift Eras Tour broke records in 2023. Swift started attending Chiefs games Oct 2023. Kelce one of top tight ends in NFL. Chiefs defending Super Bowl champions.

headline: Nvidia reports Q4 2023 earnings, stock surges
outcome: Revenue up 265% YoY, data center revenue tripled, AI chip demand overwhelming
context_notes: ChatGPT launched Nov 2022 triggered AI boom. Nvidia H100 chips in massive demand. Cloud providers racing to build AI infrastructure. Stock already up 200%+ in 2023.

headline: Google announces Gemini 1.5 Pro with 1M token context
outcome: Redefined 'long context' capabilities, enabling analysis of full codebases and movies
context_notes: GPT-4 Turbo limited to 128k context. RAG was dominant approach for long data. Gemini 1.5 utilized Ring Attention or similar architectural changes for massive context.

headline: OpenAI announces Sora video generation model
outcome: Shocked industry with 60-second photorealistic clips, sparked Hollywood labor concerns
context_notes: Text-to-video model with complex physics simulation. Not released publicly, only to red teamers. Overshadowed Google's Gemini 1.5 announcement same day.

headline: Google releases Gemma open models
outcome: Google officially enters open-weights arena to compete with Llama
context_notes: Built on Gemini research. 2B and 7B sizes. Google previously criticized for keeping models closed. Shift in strategy to commoditize the lower end of the market.

headline: Intuitive Machines 'Odysseus' lands on Moon
outcome: First private spacecraft to land on moon, first US landing since Apollo 17
context_notes: Mission IM-1. Landed near south pole. Tipped over upon landing but operational. Part of NASA's CLPS program to prepare for Artemis.

headline: Russia-Ukraine war reaches two-year mark
outcome: Stalemate continues, Ukraine aid stalled in US Congress, counteroffensive failed
context_notes: Ukraine counteroffensive summer 2023 made limited gains. Russian defense lines held. US aid package stuck in House. European allies increasing support. Zelensky visited US Dec 2023.

headline: Elon Musk sues OpenAI and Sam Altman
outcome: Alleged breach of founding contract to benefit humanity, later withdrew and refiled
context_notes: Musk claimed OpenAI became closed-source subsidiary of Microsoft. OpenAI released emails showing Musk wanted total control and merger with Tesla.

headline: Dune: Part Two releases to critical acclaim
outcome: Grossed over $700M, revitalized struggling global box office for 2024
context_notes: Delayed from 2023 due to actor strikes. Denis Villeneuve directed. Solidified Timothée Chalamet as bankable star. IMAX screens sold out for weeks.

headline: Anthropic releases Claude 3 family
outcome: Claude 3 Opus surpasses GPT-4 on LMSYS leaderboard, breaking OpenAI dominance
context_notes: OpenAI had held SOTA since Mar 2023. Claude 3 introduced Opus, Sonnet, Haiku tiers. 'Refusal' rates lowered compared to Claude 2. Strong coding performance.

headline: Super Tuesday: Trump sweeps Republican primaries
outcome: Trump won 14 of 15 states, Haley dropped out next day
context_notes: Haley only viable alternative after DeSantis dropped out Jan 2024. GOP establishment failed to coalesce behind single candidate. Trump's legal troubles boosted primary support.

headline: EU Parliament approves AI Act
outcome: First comprehensive AI regulation in the world, setting risk-based tiers
context_notes: Bans 'unacceptable risk' AI (social scoring). Strict rules for 'high risk'. General Purpose AI (GPAI) rules added late due to ChatGPT. Sets global regulatory tone.

headline: West Africa subsea cable failure causes internet blackout
outcome: Multiple cables cut, Côte d'Ivoire dropped to 4% connectivity, millions offline for weeks
context_notes: Four submarine cables damaged near Abidjan. Liberia fell to 17%, Benin to 14%, Ghana to 25%. Exposed dependency on limited cable routes. Starlink interest surged.

headline: Reddit IPO prices at $34 per share
outcome: First major tech IPO since 2021, valued at $6.4B, stock popped 48% on first day
context_notes: Reddit filed for IPO in Dec 2021, delayed due to market conditions. IPO market frozen since 2022. API pricing controversy in 2023. Company still unprofitable.

headline: Nvidia announces Blackwell B200 GPU
outcome: Claims 30x inference speedup, consolidates Nvidia's infrastructure monopoly
context_notes: H100 was the most desired hardware of 2023. Blackwell combines two reticle-sized dies. Liquid cooling required for GB200 racks. Stock continues meteoric rise.

headline: Francis Scott Key Bridge collapses in Baltimore
outcome: Container ship struck bridge support, 6 workers killed, major port closed
context_notes: Bridge built in 1977, carried I-695. Port of Baltimore 9th largest in US. Supply chain vulnerabilities exposed during COVID. Aging US infrastructure a known issue.

headline: Sabre-toothed cat mummy discovered in Siberian permafrost
outcome: Best-preserved Homotherium specimen ever found, 35,000 years old juvenile with intact fur
context_notes: Found in Yakutia, Russia. Published in Scientific Reports. Permafrost revealing more specimens as climate warms. Previous finds included mammoths and cave lions.

headline: Total solar eclipse crosses North America
outcome: Path from Mexico to Canada, millions traveled to totality zones, economic boost
context_notes: Last total eclipse in US was Aug 2017. Eclipse path predicted years in advance. Hotels in path booked years ahead. Scientific observations planned.

headline: Iran launches drone and missile attack on Israel
outcome: 300+ projectiles launched, 99% intercepted, limited damage, regional escalation fears
context_notes: Israel struck Iranian consulate in Damascus Apr 1. Iran-Israel shadow war ongoing for years. Hezbollah and Hamas backed by Iran. US forces in region.

headline: Meta releases Llama 3 (8B and 70B)
outcome: Llama 3 70B becomes the de facto standard for open-weights, beating proprietary models
context_notes: Llama 2 was the previous standard. Llama 3 trained on 15T tokens (massive increase). 400B+ model teased for later release. Zuckerberg commits to open source AGI.

headline: Bitcoin halving occurs
outcome: Block reward reduced from 6.25 to 3.125 BTC, mining profitability squeezed
context_notes: Previous halvings in 2012, 2016, 2020 preceded bull runs. Halving date predictable from blockchain. ETF approval in Jan increased institutional interest. Miners preparing for lower rewards.

headline: Columbia University pro-Palestinian encampment begins
outcome: Spread to 100+ campuses, arrests, congressional hearings, commencement disruptions
context_notes: Gaza war started Oct 7 2023. Campus protests began fall 2023. University presidents testified in Congress Dec 2023. Antisemitism concerns rising.

headline: Biden signs bill forcing TikTok divestiture or ban
outcome: ByteDance given 9 months to sell US operations or face app store ban
context_notes: Cites national security concerns regarding Chinese data ownership. TikTok sued to block law on First Amendment grounds. Deadline set for Jan 19, 2025.

headline: Orangutan observed treating wound with medicinal plant
outcome: First documented case of great ape using biologically active plant for wound treatment
context_notes: Sumatran orangutan named Rakus applied Fibraurea tinctoria to facial wound. Published in Scientific Reports. Plant has antibacterial properties. Suggests evolutionary roots of medicine.

headline: OpenAI announces GPT-4o
outcome: Multimodal model, free tier access, faster responses, voice and vision capabilities
context_notes: GPT-4 released Mar 2023. ChatGPT reached 100M users in 2 months. Google Gemini launched Dec 2023. AI race intensifying. Sam Altman fired and rehired Nov 2023.

headline: Iranian President Raisi killed in helicopter crash
outcome: Hardliner killed with foreign minister, succession crisis, Khamenei still in control
context_notes: Raisi elected 2021 in low-turnout election. Seen as potential Khamenei successor. Iran facing economic sanctions. Regional tensions high after Oct 7.

headline: Microsoft announces Copilot+ PCs and 'Recall' feature
outcome: Recall feature delayed indefinitely due to massive privacy/security backlash
context_notes: Copilot+ PCs use NPUs (mostly Qualcomm at launch). Recall takes constant screenshots to create searchable memory. Security researchers found data stored in plain text.

headline: Scarlett Johansson accuses OpenAI of copying voice
outcome: OpenAI pulled 'Sky' voice, ignited debate over AI likeness rights
context_notes: Actress claimed Sam Altman asked to license her voice for GPT-4o. She refused. 'Sky' sounded eerily similar to her character in the movie 'Her'.

headline: Trump convicted on 34 felony counts in hush money trial
outcome: First former president convicted, sentencing delayed, campaign continued
context_notes: Indictment in Mar 2023. Trial started Apr 2024. Charges related to 2016 Stormy Daniels payments. Three other indictments pending. Polls showed conviction wouldn't change support.

headline: Ticketmaster breach exposes 560 million customer records
outcome: ShinyHunters hackers accessed personal data, part of Snowflake cloud breach wave
context_notes: Live Nation owns Ticketmaster. Snowflake cloud platform compromised. AT&T also breached in same attack wave. Data sold on dark web for $500k.

headline: Claudia Sheinbaum elected first female President of Mexico
outcome: Landslide victory for ruling Morena party, climate scientist turned politician
context_notes: Protégé of outgoing president AMLO. 60% of vote. Campaign marred by violence against local candidates. Focus on social programs and nearshoring.

headline: Modi claims victory in India election with reduced majority
outcome: BJP lost parliamentary majority, forced to rely on coalition partners
context_notes: World's largest democratic exercise (640M voters). Unexpectedly strong showing for opposition INDIA alliance. Market dipped 6% then recovered.

headline: European Parliament elections show far-right gains
outcome: Right-wing parties gained seats, Macron called snap election, EU policy shift
context_notes: Immigration top issue in Europe. Le Pen's party leading in France. AfD rising in Germany. Meloni already governing Italy. Green parties losing ground.

headline: Apple announces Apple Intelligence at WWDC
outcome: AI features for iPhone, Siri upgrade, OpenAI partnership, stock hit new highs
context_notes: Apple perceived as behind in AI race. Siri outdated compared to ChatGPT. iPhone sales declining in China. Services revenue growing. WWDC 2023 focused on Vision Pro.

headline: Nvidia briefly becomes world's most valuable company
outcome: Market cap hit $3.34T, surpassing Microsoft and Apple
context_notes: Driven by insatiable demand for H100/Blackwell chips. Stock split 10-for-1 earlier in June. Highlighted the concentration of wealth in AI infrastructure.

headline: Anthropic releases Claude 3.5 Sonnet
outcome: Mid-sized model beats industry flagship (GPT-4o), establishes new price/performance tier
context_notes: Unexpected release. 'Artifacts' UI feature launched simultaneously, changing how users interact with code/content generation. Coding capabilities highly praised.

headline: Biden struggles in first debate against Trump
outcome: Biden appeared confused, lost train of thought, Democratic panic ensued
context_notes: Biden age concerns growing since 2023. Trump avoided GOP debates. Polls showed close race. Biden campaign emphasized experience. Some Democrats wanted open primary.

headline: Supreme Court grants Trump partial immunity
outcome: Presidents have immunity for official acts, cases delayed past election
context_notes: Trump facing four criminal cases. Jan 6 case in DC. Florida documents case. Special counsel Jack Smith prosecuting. Court had 6-3 conservative majority.

headline: Labour Party wins landslide in UK General Election
outcome: Keir Starmer becomes PM, ending 14 years of Conservative rule
context_notes: Conservatives suffered worst defeat in history. Rishi Sunak resigned. Reform UK split right-wing vote. Voter turnout relatively low.

headline: French elections: Left-wing alliance wins surprise victory
outcome: New Popular Front won most seats, no majority, hung parliament
context_notes: Macron called snap election after EU vote. Le Pen's RN led first round. Left parties formed tactical alliance. Strategic voting in second round.

headline: Paramount agrees to merge with Skydance
outcome: Ends Redstone family control of CBS/Paramount, David Ellison to become CEO
context_notes: Months of dramatic negotiations. Shari Redstone finally agreed to sell National Amusements. Values Skydance at $4.75B. Marks shift in legacy media ownership.

headline: Trump survives assassination attempt at Pennsylvania rally
outcome: Bullet grazed ear, one attendee killed, shooter killed by Secret Service
context_notes: Political violence concerns high. Trump rallies drew large crowds. Secret Service responsible for protection. Polarization at historic levels.

headline: CrowdStrike update causes global IT outage
outcome: 8.5 million Windows devices crashed, grounding flights and halting hospitals
context_notes: Caused by faulty channel file update in Falcon sensor. Exposed fragility of centralized security software. Microsoft estimated impact. Cost billions in damages.

headline: Biden withdraws from 2024 race, endorses Harris
outcome: First incumbent to withdraw since LBJ, Harris quickly consolidated support
context_notes: Debate performance triggered calls to withdraw. Democratic donors paused funding. Obama remained silent. Harris was VP, obvious successor. Convention in August.

headline: Meta releases Llama 3.1 including 405B model
outcome: First open-weights model to rival top-tier closed models (GPT-4o) in capability
context_notes: 405B requires massive hardware to run. Distilled smaller models (8B, 70B) became significantly better. Synthetic data generation for other models exploded.

headline: Paris Olympics opening ceremony held on Seine
outcome: First outdoor opening ceremony, Celine Dion returns, massive global viewership
context_notes: Rain soaked event. Security high. Controversy over 'Last Supper' tableau. US topped medal table, tied with China for golds.

headline: Google found guilty of illegal search monopoly
outcome: DOJ antitrust win, remedies pending, could reshape tech industry
context_notes: DOJ antitrust case filed in 2020. Trial concluded late 2023. Google controls 90%+ of search. Default agreements with Apple worth $15B/year.

headline: National Public Data breach exposes 2.9 billion records
outcome: SSNs, addresses, phone numbers leaked; one of largest breaches ever; company filed bankruptcy
context_notes: Background check company. Data scraped from public sources but aggregated. Breach occurred Dec 2023, disclosed Aug 2024. Multiple class action lawsuits filed.

headline: Starbucks replaces CEO with Chipotle's Brian Niccol
outcome: Stock surges 25%, turnaround strategy anticipated
context_notes: Starbucks same-store sales declining. China market struggling. Activist Elliott Management took stake. Chipotle stock up 300% under Niccol.

headline: Mpox outbreak declared global health emergency again
outcome: New clade spreads from DRC, vaccine distribution challenges
context_notes: Mpox declared emergency in 2022, then downgraded. New clade 1b emerging in DRC. Higher mortality rate. Limited vaccine supply in Africa.

headline: Harris accepts Democratic nomination at Chicago convention
outcome: Historic nomination, Walz as VP pick, party unity, polls tightened
context_notes: First Black and South Asian woman nominated. Convention in Chicago. Walz chosen over Shapiro. Enthusiasm gap closed with Republicans.

headline: Black Myth: Wukong releases global sales records
outcome: Sold 10M copies in 3 days, proved viability of Chinese AAA gaming
context_notes: Developed by Game Science. Unreal Engine 5. 2.4M concurrent players on Steam (record for single-player). Boosted PS5 sales in China.

headline: Telegram CEO Pavel Durov arrested in France
outcome: Charged with complicity in managing illegal platform content, released on bail
context_notes: Accused of refusing to cooperate with law enforcement regarding drug trafficking/CSAM on Telegram. Sparked free speech debate. Telegram changed TOS shortly after.

headline: X (Twitter) banned in Brazil over disinformation dispute
outcome: Supreme Court ordered shutdown, Bluesky gained 2M+ Brazilian users in days
context_notes: Justice Alexandre de Moraes demanded account removals. Musk called him authoritarian. X refused to appoint legal representative. Ban lasted until October.

headline: Harris-Trump debate on ABC
outcome: Harris seen as winner, Taylor Swift endorsed Harris, Trump refused second debate
context_notes: First debate between candidates. Biden debate had hurt Democrats. Harris as prosecutor vs Trump as defendant. Polls still close.

headline: Huawei launches Mate XT trifold smartphone
outcome: World's first mass-produced triple-fold phone, sold out instantly despite $2800 price
context_notes: Huawei recovering from US sanctions. Uses HarmonyOS. No Google services. 10.2-inch unfolded display. Samsung and others still on dual-fold designs.

headline: OpenAI releases o1-preview (Strawberry)
outcome: Introduces 'inference-time compute' paradigm, crushing math/coding benchmarks
context_notes: Model 'thinks' before answering. Chain of Thought hidden from user. Moves value from pre-training to inference. Solves PhD level science problems.

headline: Second Trump assassination attempt at golf course
outcome: Suspect arrested with rifle near fence, Secret Service spotted him first
context_notes: First attempt in July. Security concerns heightened. Trump continued outdoor events. Political violence rhetoric debated.

headline: Pager explosions across Lebanon kill dozens
outcome: Attributed to Israel, Hezbollah leadership targeted, precursor to ground invasion
context_notes: Israel-Hezbollah exchanging fire since Oct 7. Hezbollah rockets hitting northern Israel. Civilians evacuated from border. Netanyahu vowing to return residents.

headline: Federal Reserve cuts rates by 50 basis points
outcome: Larger than expected cut, markets rallied, soft landing narrative strengthened
context_notes: Fed held rates at 5.25-5.5% since July 2023. Inflation falling toward 2%. Labor market cooling. Debate between 25bp vs 50bp cut.

headline: Shohei Ohtani creates the 50/50 club
outcome: First MLB player to hit 50 homers and steal 50 bases in a season
context_notes: Dodgers superstar had arguably best offensive season in history while recovering from elbow surgery. 6-for-6 game to break record.

headline: Israel launches ground invasion of Lebanon
outcome: Limited incursion targeting Hezbollah tunnels, Iran retaliated with missile barrage
context_notes: Nasrallah killed Sept 27. Pager attacks Sept 17. Hezbollah leadership decimated. US urged restraint. Iran promised response.

headline: Scientists complete first full map of fruit fly brain
outcome: 139,255 neurons mapped, breakthrough for neuroscience research
context_notes: C. elegans connectome completed 1986. FlyWire consortium working since 2019. EM imaging + AI reconstruction.

headline: Nobel Prize in Physics awarded for neural network foundations
outcome: Hopfield and Hinton recognized, AI legitimized as physics contribution
context_notes: Hopfield networks 1982. Hinton pioneered deep learning. Hinton quit Google warning about AI. AI boom since ChatGPT.

headline: Nobel Prize in Chemistry awarded to AlphaFold developers
outcome: Hassabis, Jumper, Baker recognized for computational protein design
context_notes: AlphaFold2 solved protein folding in 2020. AlphaFold3 released May 2024. David Baker pioneered Rosetta. Revolutionary for drug discovery.

headline: Hurricane Milton rapidly intensifies to Category 5
outcome: Hit Florida weeks after Helene, record rapid intensification
context_notes: Gulf water temperatures at record highs. Helene killed 200+ in Sept. Rapid intensification becoming more common.

headline: Tesla unveils Cybercab at 'We, Robot' event
outcome: Stock dropped 9% next day due to lack of technical details and timelines
context_notes: Showed steering-wheel-free robotaxi and Robovan. Optimus robots served drinks (later revealed to be tele-operated). Musk promised production by 2026.

headline: NASA launches Europa Clipper mission
outcome: Largest spacecraft for planetary mission, searching for life signs
context_notes: Europa has subsurface ocean. Launch window Oct 2024. SpaceX Falcon Heavy as vehicle. 49 flybys planned.

headline: Anthropic introduces 'Computer Use' for Claude
outcome: AI can view screen and control mouse/keyboard, moving towards agentic workflows
context_notes: Released in beta. Microsoft and others exploring similar 'agent' concepts. Safety rails implemented to prevent misuse. High latency initially.

headline: Bitcoin breaks above $70k heading into election
outcome: ETF inflows accelerated, crypto became campaign issue
context_notes: ETFs approved Jan 2024. $50B+ inflows. April halving. Trump went pro-crypto at Bitcoin conference. Previous ATH $69k in 2021.

headline: Flash floods in Spain kill over 200 people
outcome: Deadliest floods in modern Spanish history, massive anger at government response
context_notes: Valencia region hardest hit. 'DANA' weather phenomenon. King Felipe VI pelted with mud by protesters. Raised questions about climate adaptation.

headline: Trump wins 2024 presidential election
outcome: Won popular vote and electoral college, Republicans took Senate
context_notes: Polls showed toss-up. Harris momentum after convention. Two assassination attempts. Economy and immigration top issues. Biden dropped out July.

headline: Markets rally sharply after Trump victory
outcome: Bitcoin surged past $90k, Tesla jumped 40%, bond yields rose
context_notes: Markets prefer certainty. Trump promised tax cuts and deregulation. Musk supported Trump. Deficit concerns emerged.

headline: HarmonyOS surpasses iOS market share in China
outcome: Huawei's OS captures 19% vs Apple's 17% in Q4, third-largest mobile OS globally
context_notes: US sanctions forced Huawei to build own OS. HarmonyOS NEXT fully replaced Android components. Chinese consumers supported domestic brand. iPhone sales declining in China.

headline: SpaceX catches Super Heavy booster with chopstick arms
outcome: First successful booster catch, major step toward full reusability
context_notes: Starship development ongoing since 2019. Previous flights exploded. Mechazilla tower design unique. Musk targeting Mars.

headline: Gautam Adani indicted by US prosecutors
outcome: Charged with $250M bribery scheme, Adani Group stocks crashed
context_notes: Allegedly bribed Indian officials for solar energy contracts while raising money from US investors. Adani denied charges. Kenya cancelled major airport deal.

headline: COP29 concludes in Baku with $300B finance deal
outcome: Developing nations slammed deal as insufficient, 'climate finance' goal tripled
context_notes: Goal to help poorer nations cut emissions. Critics wanted $1T+. US delegation constrained by incoming Trump administration. Transition away from fossil fuels reaffirmed.

headline: Ukraine war approaches 1000 days, North Korean troops deployed
outcome: Russia made slow territorial gains, Ukraine used long-range missiles
context_notes: Counteroffensive failed 2023. US aid delayed. North Korea supplied ammunition. Kursk incursion summer 2024.

headline: Biden pardons son Hunter Biden
outcome: Reversed previous pledge not to pardon him, cited political prosecution
context_notes: Covers tax offenses and gun conviction. Hunter had faced sentencing in Dec. Republicans criticized move as abuse of power.

headline: South Korean President Yoon declares martial law
outcome: Reversed within hours after parliament rejection, impeachment began
context_notes: Yoon unpopular, approval ~20%. Opposition controlled parliament. Cited North Korea threat. Troops surrounded parliament.

headline: UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson shot and killed
outcome: Targeted attack in NYC, suspect Luigi Mangione arrested after manhunt
context_notes: Words 'deny', 'defend', 'depose' found on shell casings. Sparked national debate on insurance claim denials. Suspect found with ghost gun and manifesto.

headline: Bitcoin crosses $100,000
outcome: Psychological milestone, altcoins rallied, institutional adoption accelerated
context_notes: ETF inflows continued. Trump win seen as crypto-friendly. Previous peak $69k in 2021. Halving in April.

headline: Notre Dame reopens five years after fire
outcome: Massive restoration completed on schedule, global ceremony held
context_notes: 2019 fire destroyed spire and roof. Restoration cost €700M. Macron fulfilled pledge to reopen within 5 years. New spire identical to Viollet-le-Duc design.

headline: Assad regime collapses, rebels take Damascus
outcome: Assad fled to Russia, major geopolitical realignment in Middle East
context_notes: Syria civil war started 2011. Russia intervened 2015. HTS rebels advanced rapidly. Hezbollah weakened. Iran distracted by Israel.

headline: Google unveils Willow quantum chip
outcome: Solved benchmark problem in 5 minutes that would take classical computers 10 septillion years
context_notes: 105 qubits with improved error correction. Demonstrated 'below threshold' error rates. IBM and others also racing. Practical quantum computing still years away.

headline: Trump announces controversial cabinet picks
outcome: RFK Jr for HHS, DOGE with Musk and Ramaswamy, Hegseth for Defense
context_notes: RFK Jr vaccine skeptic. Musk heavily involved in campaign. Gaetz nominated then withdrew. Senate confirmation fights expected.

headline: Google DeepMind releases Gemini 2.0
outcome: Multimodal AI with agentic capabilities, direct ChatGPT competitor
context_notes: Original Gemini launched Dec 2023. OpenAI released GPT-4o. Anthropic launched Claude 3.5. AI capability race intensifying.

headline: Fed cuts rates 25bp but signals slower 2025 pace
outcome: Markets sold off on hawkish guidance, 2 cuts expected for 2025 vs 4 prior
context_notes: September 50bp cut. Inflation sticky above 2%. Labor market resilient. Trump fiscal policy could be inflationary.

headline: Congress averts government shutdown with stopgap bill
outcome: Musk and Trump opposed original deal, revised bill passed
context_notes: Funding deadline Dec 20. Johnson struggled with slim majority. DOGE influence on spending. Debt ceiling fight looming.

headline: Squid Game Season 2 releases on Netflix
outcome: Projected to be biggest streaming event of the year
context_notes: Sequel to 2021's most-watched series ever. Lee Jung-jae returns. Massive marketing campaign. Released alongside NFL Christmas games on Netflix.

headline: DeepSeek releases DeepSeek-V3
outcome: Open-weights model matching top US labs at fraction of training cost ($5.6M)
context_notes: Chinese lab. Uses Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) and Multi-Head Latent Attention (MLA). Disproves notion that export controls would completely stifle Chinese AI progress.

headline: Jimmy Carter dies at age 100
outcome: Former president passed peacefully, national mourning, Jan 9 funeral
context_notes: Oldest living president. In hospice care since Feb 2023. Nobel Peace Prize winner. Post-presidency humanitarian work.

headline: S&P 500 finishes 2024 up 23%
outcome: Second consecutive year of 20%+ gains, AI stocks led, valuation concerns
context_notes: Magnificent 7 drove gains. Nvidia up 170%. Fed pivot helped. Recession avoided. Concentration risk in index.

headline: Magnitude 7.6 earthquake strikes Noto Peninsula, Japan
outcome: Tsunami warnings issued, major infrastructure damage, 200+ casualties
context_notes: Struck on New Year's Day. Highlighted Japan's strict building codes which prevented higher casualties. Disrupted semiconductor supply chains.

headline: Prabowo Subianto wins Indonesia presidential election
outcome: Decisive first-round victory (~58%) in world's third-largest democracy
context_notes: Prabowo rebranded from military hardliner to 'cuddly grandfather' figure. Allied with outgoing popular president Jokowi's son as VP. Continuity candidate.

headline: Sweden officially joins NATO as 32nd member
outcome: Ends 200 years of military non-alignment, turns Baltic Sea into 'NATO lake'
context_notes: Application stalled by Turkey and Hungary for months. Triggered by Russia's invasion of Ukraine. Completes Nordic integration into alliance.

headline: Catastrophic floods devastate southern Brazil
outcome: Porto Alegre submerged, airport closed indefinitely, $10B+ economic loss
context_notes: State of public calamity declared. Rainfall exceeded historical records. Highlighted lack of urban climate adaptation. Disrupted global soy/grain markets.

headline: ANC loses parliamentary majority in South Africa election
outcome: Forced into coalition government for first time since end of Apartheid (1994)
context_notes: Vote share dropped below 50%. Rise of MK party led by former president Zuma split the vote. Market rallied on formation of Government of National Unity.

headline: Japan's ruling LDP loses majority in snap election
outcome: Political instability in G7 nation, Prime Minister Ishiba leads minority government
context_notes: Voters punished LDP for 'slush fund' scandal. Inflation hurting approval ratings. Opposition CDP made significant gains but failed to unite.
